job: refine ROCKY-5 from OFFICIAL sculpt; fingers sacred, servos hidden
method: planar bisect + EXACT boolean only (NO voxel remesh)

hand_limb.found: 3-finger manipulator hand on the front raised arm (profiled tip bbox ~8x9x17mm raw); isolated by bisect wedge, instanced 5x so every foot has proper fingers

thorax.cavity_note: Jetson(on-edge)+battery(on-end) bays side-by-side, opening to base hatch

tibia.fingers: SACRED 3-finger manipulator hand PRESERVED 1:1 (sculpt-native, distal of the knee2 cut; no graft/cone/cavity/boss)

knee1.servo: EduLite Ø46x44 flat mount at slender joint (limb 37mm < servo 46mm); hidden under cosmetic refined_knee1_cover.stl stone sleeve

knee2.servo: EduLite Ø46x44 flat mount at slender joint (limb 48mm < servo 46mm); hidden under cosmetic refined_knee2_cover.stl stone sleeve

hip.servo: EduLite Ø46x44 at the coxa root, tucked inside the thorax leg socket

covers.note: thin stone sleeve over the flat joint+servo; outer face = sculpt, clips/bolts on so the assembled robot reads as the sculpt
thin stone sleeve over the flat joint+servo; outer face = sculpt, clips/bolts on so the assembled robot reads as the sculpt

parts_fingers_note: The sacred 3-finger manipulator hand rides the DISTAL end of the tibia segment, entirely beyond the knee2 cut. No graft, no cone, no grip cavity, no servo boss touches it — preserved 1:1 from the sculpt.

assembly.pose: RIGID natural placement (sculpt joint angles preserved; faces mate, no wedge gaps)
assembly.symmetry: true 5-fold radial (5 identical hand-limbs @72deg, each foot a 3-finger hand)

print_set.note: 5 identical hand-limbs -> print coxa/femur/tibia (+covers) x5 from one STL each
